Hero.description: ELAOUAD conceives, engineers and realizes exceptional spaces — from BIM concept to delivery, across 4 continents.

Manifesto.label: Our philosophy
Manifesto.subtitle: Each project embodies our commitment to technical excellence and enduring beauty.

Services.label: Our expertise
Services.title: Complete solutions for every phase of your project
Services.subtitle: From initial concept to final realization, we master all disciplines of contemporary architecture.

01.title: Architecture
01.value: Design with light, build with matter.
01.description: Complete architectural design for residential, commercial, and public projects, with precise attention to context, light, and use.

02.title: BIM Consulting
02.value: Predictive engineering in service of precision.
02.description: Intelligent modeling, spatial coordination, and data management to anticipate conflicts before construction.

03.title: Engineering & Project Management
03.value: From sketch to handover, complete control.
03.description: Technical leadership, cost control, scheduling coordination, and execution monitoring to protect time, budget, and quality.

04.title: Interior Design
04.value: Spatial experience refined to the detail.
04.description: Materials, light, furniture, and atmosphere are designed as a natural continuation of the architecture.

05.title: Urban Planning
05.value: Designing tomorrow's city at territorial scale.
05.description: Masterplans, impact studies, and urban strategies for sustainable, legible, and lively districts.

Projets.label: Our portfolio
Projets.title: Selected projects
Projets.description: An overview of our work across different typologies and contexts.

Apropos.label: About
Apropos.quote: Architecture is both an artistic act and a technical responsibility. Every project we deliver must be beautiful, solid, durable and useful.
Apropos.description: With over 15 years of experience in prestigious projects across Africa and Europe, Soukaina Elaouad leads ELAOUAD with a vision that combines technical precision and artistic sensitivity.
Apropos.cred1: Graduate of the National School of Architecture
Apropos.cred2: Expert in BIM and sustainable design
Apropos.cred3: Member of the Moroccan Order of Architects
